explanation: Chick-fil-A's Item 19 reports actual historical sales of franchised Operator restaurants that were open for a full calendar year as of December 31, 2024. The FPR is revenue-only (no pro-forma, no illustrative economics, no OIBOC or cost build-up). The Item 6 fee structure (15% base + 50% additional operating service fee) applies uniformly to all current and prospective operators. There is no cohort-comparability issue because: (1) no pro-forma or cost adjustment is presented, (2) the fee structure does not vary by vintage, and (3) the population consists of actual current operators under current terms.
